name: Analilia Mejia
background: Co-executive director, Center for Popular Democracy. Daughter of Colombian/Dominican immigrants. Former national political director, Bernie Sanders 2020 campaign. Former deputy director, U.S. Women's Bureau (Biden admin).

positions.stance: Free public college, student loan cancellation
Called Netanyahu a war criminal. Condition aid on human rights.
Supports — rare common ground with Hathaway
Called Hathaway a 'rubber stamp for Trump'

primary_result.outcome: Won upset primary over former Rep. Tom Malinowski

debate_performance.format: Virtual, hosted by NJ Globe + Rider University's Rebovich Institute
key_quotes: Called Hathaway a 'wolf in sheep's clothing'
Called Hathaway a 'rubber stamp for Trump'
debate_performance.note: Mejia initially refused the League of Women Voters debate (cancelled March 20)
